name: Templates
intent: Integrate Nunjucks template engine for prompt composition with three-tier resolution, template inheritance, and ${{ }} protection.

success_criteria.criterion: Nunjucks renders {% extends %}/{% block %}/{% include %}/{% macro %}
Three-tier template discovery: project > user > builtin
Agent specs compile prompts through Nunjucks unconditionally
Template analysis demo with shared base template works

specs.name: Template Engine
specs.intent: Nunjucks integration with FileSystemLoader, ${{ }} protection, three-tier resolution
acceptance_criteria: renderTemplate() resolves templates from three tiers
{% extends %} and {% block %} work across tiers

specs.name: Template Demo
specs.intent: Demonstrate template inheritance with analyzers sharing a base template
acceptance_criteria: Task templates render from typed input data
